testcase.name: test_listings_feed

failure.message: assert ('listings' in {'hasMore': True, 'items': [{'category': None, 'cityName': 'Dar es Salaam CBD, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania', 'countryCode': 'TZ', 'createdAt': '2026-03-07T04:43:28.974000', ...}, {'category': None, 'cityName': 'Dar es Salaam', 'countryCode': 'TZ', 'createdAt': '2026-02-28T08:00:53.034000', ...}, {'category': None, 'cityName': 'Dar es Salaam', 'countryCode': 'TZ', 'createdAt': '2026-02-28T08:00:12.490000', ...}, {'category': None, 'cityName': 'Masaki, Dar es Salaam', 'countryCode': 'TZ', 'createdAt': '2026-02-25T20:37:18.963000', ...}, {'category': None, 'cityName': 'Masaki', 'countryCode': 'TZ', 'createdAt': '2026-02-25T14:09:44.562000', ...}], 'nextCursor': '{"id": "738e0749-a4c0-4f3e-91e2-c06e6c84bf66", "created_at": "2026-02-25T14:09:44.562000"}', 'serverTime': '2026-03-07T05:53:23.943514+00:00', ...} or False) + where False = isinstance({'hasMore': True, 'items': [{'category': None, 'cityName': 'Dar es Salaam CBD, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania', 'countryCode': 'TZ', 'createdAt': '2026-03-07T04:43:28.974000', ...}, {'category': None, 'cityName': 'Dar es Salaam', 'countryCode': 'TZ', 'createdAt': '2026-02-28T08:00:53.034000', ...}, {'category': None, 'cityName': 'Dar es Salaam', 'countryCode': 'TZ', 'createdAt': '2026-02-28T08:00:12.490000', ...}, {'category': None, 'cityName': 'Masaki, Dar es Salaam', 'countryCode': 'TZ', 'createdAt': '2026-02-25T20:37:18.963000', ...}, {'category': None, 'cityName': 'Masaki', 'countryCode': 'TZ', 'createdAt': '2026-02-25T14:09:44.562000', ...}], 'nextCursor': '{"id": "738e0749-a4c0-4f3e-91e2-c06e6c84bf66", "created_at": "2026-02-25T14:09:44.562000"}', 'serverTime': '2026-03-07T05:53:23.943514+00:00', ...}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_200.py:61: in test_listings_feed assert "listings" in data or isinstance(data, list) E assert ('listings' in {'hasMore': True, 'items': [{'category': None, 'cityName': 'Dar es Salaam CBD, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania', 'countryCode': 'TZ', 'createdAt': '2026-03-07T04:43:28.974000', ...}, {'category': None, 'cityName': 'Dar es Salaam', 'countryCode': 'TZ', 'createdAt': '2026-02-28T08:00:53.034000', ...}, {'category': None, 'cityName': 'Dar es Salaam', 'countryCode': 'TZ', 'createdAt': '2026-02-28T08:00:12.490000', ...}, {'category': None, 'cityName': 'Masaki, Dar es Salaam', 'countryCode': 'TZ', 'createdAt': '2026-02-25T20:37:18.963000', ...}, {'category': None, 'cityName': 'Masaki', 'countryCode': 'TZ', 'createdAt': '2026-02-25T14:09:44.562000', ...}], 'nextCursor': '{"id": "738e0749-a4c0-4f3e-91e2-c06e6c84bf66", "created_at": "2026-02-25T14:09:44.562000"}', 'serverTime': '2026-03-07T05:53:23.943514+00:00', ...} or False) E + where False = isinstance({'hasMore': True, 'items': [{'category': None, 'cityName': 'Dar es Salaam CBD, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania', 'countryCode': 'TZ', 'createdAt': '2026-03-07T04:43:28.974000', ...}, {'category': None, 'cityName': 'Dar es Salaam', 'countryCode': 'TZ', 'createdAt': '2026-02-28T08:00:53.034000', ...}, {'category': None, 'cityName': 'Dar es Salaam', 'countryCode': 'TZ', 'createdAt': '2026-02-28T08:00:12.490000', ...}, {'category': None, 'cityName': 'Masaki, Dar es Salaam', 'countryCode': 'TZ', 'createdAt': '2026-02-25T20:37:18.963000', ...}, {'category': None, 'cityName': 'Masaki', 'countryCode': 'TZ', 'createdAt': '2026-02-25T14:09:44.562000', ...}], 'nextCursor': '{"id": "738e0749-a4c0-4f3e-91e2-c06e6c84bf66", "created_at": "2026-02-25T14:09:44.562000"}', 'serverTime': '2026-03-07T05:53:23.943514+00:00', ...}, list)
